aiPresets.label: 迅捷 (風)
aiPresets.prompt: A futuristic, cyber-enhanced point guard basketball player, wearing glowing cyan jersey, lightning speed visual effects, athletic pose, holographic basketball, dark background with blue lens flare.

aiPresets.label: 幻影 (影)
aiPresets.prompt: An elusive basketball point guard, fantasy rogue style, wearing dark hooded tech-jersey, purple magical afterimages, mysterious mist, urban night street background.

aiPresets.label: 狙擊 (準)
aiPresets.prompt: A legendary sharp-shooting guard, futuristic tactical gear, mechanical eye-patch for aiming, glowing red shooting hand, burning basketball, dramatic stadium lighting.

aiPresets.label: 烈焰 (火)
aiPresets.prompt: An explosive shooting guard, anime style art, fire aura emanating from hands and feet, mid-air fadeaway jump shot, vibrant orange and red color palette.

aiPresets.label: 全能 (雷)
aiPresets.prompt: A versatile small forward warrior, wearing sleek black and gold armor, glowing blue electricity sparks, dynamic dunking pose, breaking through glass visual effect.

aiPresets.label: 王牌 (光)
aiPresets.prompt: A heroic small forward leader, bright golden radiance, angel-wing-like light effects, triumphant pose holding a golden basketball, clouds and sunbeam background.

aiPresets.label: 鋼鐵 (山)
aiPresets.prompt: A massive power forward, heavy mecha-inspired suit, glowing green energy shields, defensive low stance, industrial sci-fi arena, high detail mechanical parts.

aiPresets.label: 蠻力 (獸)
aiPresets.prompt: A beast-mode power forward, primal stone-textured skin, wearing rugged leather and fur basketball gear, roaring while dunking, cracked ground effects.

aiPresets.label: 霸主 (宙)
aiPresets.prompt: A colossal basketball center, cosmic skin texture with stars and galaxies inside, glowing white eyes, majestic crown made of energy, space nebula background.

aiPresets.label: 守護 (盾)
aiPresets.prompt: A high-tech defensive center, impenetrable energy field around him, towering presence, heavy metallic white armor, icy blue atmosphere, professional photography style.
